prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划:
2021-2025年最低位次分别为19813→22302→25605→24243→25787，整体呈后移趋势（位次数字增大），近5年累计后移约5974名；2025年基准位次约25787名。
2. 【招生计划】本省计划2021-2025年分别为134→138→139→159→162人，持续扩招；2026年计划约165人，较2025年继续小幅扩招约3人，扩招幅度约1.85%，对竞争略有缓解但 幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，理工类院校；软科主榜排名约第60-80名区间，近年排名稳定；化学工程与技术为A级学科（第四轮学科评估A），材料科学与工程为A-级学科，化学为B+级学科；化工、材料等王牌专业对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 化工、材料、计算机、法学等专业热度分化；省控线数据 缺失。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（约1.85%）、学校211层次稳定、优势学科吸引力等因素，在2025年基准25787名基础上 ，预计2026年最低位次继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约26104名，区间25604-26604名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（卓越实验班）
- 工科试验班（宏德书院）
- 计算机类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 材料科学与工程（材料、大数据双学士学位）
- 自动化类
- 化学工程与工艺（化工、大数据双学士学位）
- 化学（基础拔尖）
- 理科试验班（数学、物理电子与管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（绿色化工与生物医药）
- 工科试验班（先进材料）
- 工商管理类（新文科经管法）
- 环境工程（环工、大数据双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约26104名，区间25604-26604名。建议位次在25600名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档专业（法学卓越班、宏德书院、计算机类）；位次在25600-26600名之间的考生以二档 专业为主力填报区间，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在26600名以后的考生建议以三档专业保底，同时关注二档中位次要求相对较低的专业。化工、材料等王牌双学位项目性价比高，值得 重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were 19813 → 22302 → 25605 → 24243 → 25787, showing an overall backward trend (increasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative backward shift of approximately 5974 positions over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 25787.
2. [Enrollment Plan] Provincial enrollment from 2021 to 2025 was 134 → 138 → 139 → 159 → 162, continuously expanding; the 2026 plan is approximately 165, a slight increase of about 3 compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 1.85%, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, a science and engineering institution; ranked approximately in the 60-80 range on the Soft Science main list, with stable rankings in recent years; Chemical Engineering and Technology is an A-level discipline (A in the fourth round of discipline evaluation), Materials Science and Engineering is an A- level discipline, and Chemistry is a B+ level discipline; flagship majors such as chemical engineering and materials have sustained appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as chemical engineering, materials, computer science, and law show differentiated popularity; provincial control line data is missing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (about 1.85%), the stable 211 level of the school, and the appeal of advantageous disciplines, based on the 2025 baseline of 25787, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to continue a slight backward shift; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 26104, with a range of 25604-26604.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (Excellent Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Hongde Academy)
- Computer Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Materials, Big Data Dual Degree)
- Automation
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Chemical Engineering, Big Data Dual Degree)
- Chemistry (Basic Top-Notch)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics, Physics Electronics and Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Green Chemical Engineering and Biomedicine)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials)
- Business Administration (New Liberal Arts, Economics, Management, Law)
- Environmental Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Big Data Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 26104, range 25604-26604. Candidates with rankings within 25600 are advised to focus on Tier 1 majors (Law Excellent Class, Hongde Academy, Computer Science); candidates with rankings between 25600-26600 should primarily target Tier 2 majors as the main application range, while also considering Tier 1 as a stretch; candidates with rankings above 26600 are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with relatively lower ranking requirements. Flagship dual-degree programs such as chemical engineering and materials offer high cost-performance and deserve special attention.
